title: UltimaCraft PBR Modded
description: Add-on for UltimaCraft PBR which adds realistic material maps
body:
# UltimaCraft PBR Modded

UltimaCraft PBR Modded is an add-on for UltimaCraft Modded resource pack, which is focused on adding realistic look not only for vanilla blocks but also modded ones.

Features:
- physically based materials using LabPBR format (requires shaders using Iris or Oculus or Optifine)

Supported mods:
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Create (partial)
- Create Deco (partial)
- Twigs (partial)
